creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 239168
Screenshot: Netdata, one month, HP EliteBook 8570p with L2ARC across two low-end USB thumb drives

(In reply to Stefan Eßer from comment #0)

> … there might be a wrap-around after several weeks of up-time, …

I never looked (with my local-only installation of Netdata <https://www.freshports.org/net-mgmt/netdata/>) at a period longer than one month. 14.0-CURRENT here. 

For what it's worth: over the past year or so I have looked often enough, at periods involving a few days of uptime, to _not_ suspect a bug affecting longer-term uptimes. 

Still, maybe worth investigating. 

Do check upstream, <https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/>.
